[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000010000 1
1 000000000 a
2 000000100 1
3 000100010 2
4 100000010 2
5 111001101 6
6 011010111 6
7 101000000 2

01 10 000000100 1 match 2
12 21 000000010 1
23 32 110000000 2
34 43 011000101 4
45 54 001000000 1
56 65 100000000 1
67 76 010000101 3
70 07 000000100 1 match 2

24 42 010000010 2
